title: AI-NEWS Competitive Analysis Evaluation Protocol
desc: Evaluate AI-NEWS suggests: extract pattern, check WKAppBot coverage, close with analysis note
steps: Extract core pattern from HN/YT post title
Check if WKAppBot already has equivalent (MCP, CDP a11y ask, eye)
If applicable: queue as feature with concrete note
If duplicate/covered: close with competitive analysis note
wkappbot ask/skill/suggest commands cover most AI-NEWS patterns

requirements.cmd: wkappbot ask gemini 'evaluate CDP self-healing pattern'

requirements.expect: AI-NEWS resolved after evaluation, no code change

author: claude
